race.comment: Wide open with a few of these needing some luck from the draws. INHERENTLY (10) is long overdue and continues to race well. Placed last two, the latest beaten just a neck at Caulfield Heath, and can go one better. BERGASUN (1) was a BM70 winner two back then stepped out over 2400m last time and led but weakened out of it. Might have been too firm that day. Freshened for this and back in trip. Take catching. FOIRE DE TRONE (14) is another drawn out but was a gutsy winner fresh and can only be fitter. Hard to hold out late.  OMAMORI (9) is fitter for two runs in, the latest an improved fifth over 1746m at Sale. Senior rider goes aboard and should be ready to fire. Top three chance.

Live1.SchedulerNote: Provincial **Use extended Racing.com coverage where possible**
